next_priority: Promote reconciled partial specs into a smaller backlog: reviewed content depth, optional live API smoke documentation, and UI visual polish only when explicitly scheduled.

records.rationale: The roadmap intentionally spans multiple commercial stages. Core MVP commercial loops are implemented, while full roadmap breadth remains an operating backlog.
records.recommended_action: Keep implemented commercial slices covered by report, entitlement, guild, creator, market, build, and player UI tests; schedule only explicitly selected roadmap gaps.
records.title: GW2Radar Commercial Opportunity Full Implementation Roadmap — Codex Spec

records.rationale: KB, rule, patch, and report infrastructure exists, but the plan is intentionally larger than the current reviewed rule content inventory.
records.recommended_action: Prioritize reviewed rule pack content and source-evidence quality, not new lifecycle plumbing.
records.title: GW2Radar Knowledge Base, Knowledge Graph & Commercial Intelligence Implementation Plan

records.rationale: The master plan intentionally describes progression engines, planning agents, SaaS, growth, and subscription evolution beyond the closed local-first MVP.
records.recommended_action: Use the post-MVP production roadmap gate to schedule Phase A first and keep SaaS, autonomous agents, and real billing as later explicit stages.
records.title: GW2Radar / GW2 Progression 全部规划与系统设计汇总（统一主文档）

records.rationale: This early planning spec predates later API, UI, commercial, KB, and delivery lifecycle work; partial status mostly reflects historical wording.
records.recommended_action: Use current PRD/SDD, MVP docs, and stage gate as source of truth; keep this spec as historical input.
records.title: GW2Radar MVP 0.1 研制规范

records.rationale: Official-compatible client, token safety, permission checks, batching, refresh queues, and diagnostics are covered by tests; live GW2 availability remains an external runtime condition.
records.recommended_action: Do not expand scope into live certification. Keep fake gateway and contract tests strict, then add optional live smoke only behind explicit operator configuration.
records.title: GW2Radar Official GW2 API Compatibility Layer — Codex Development Spec

records.rationale: Current AGENTS/PRD/SDD now express local-first, manual-review, no-secret, no-trading, and source-boundary governance; older spec remains broader than the active MVP.
records.recommended_action: Keep governance enforced through stage gate, no-secret tests, and workspace hygiene; avoid adding SaaS or automation scope.
records.title: GW2Radar Project Constitution & API Access Governance — Codex Development Spec

records.rationale: Player cockpit, account diagnostics, Build Fit, Legendary, Market, reports, and support handoff are implemented; guide-level polish and browser visual review remain iterative.
records.recommended_action: Use future UI slices for browser screenshots and senior-player copy refinement when layout changes are made.
records.title: GW2Radar Senior Player User Guide

records.rationale: Report export is now covered by productized report artifacts and shared delivery lifecycle verification rather than the original narrow MVP package wording.
records.recommended_action: Treat this as superseded by delivery lifecycle regression unless a legacy export route is explicitly requested.
records.title: MVP 0.1.2 Report Export Package

records.rationale: Evidence quality patterns exist across KB, reports, source attribution, and player diagnostics; remaining maturity is richer reviewed source coverage.
records.recommended_action: Invest next in reviewed content depth and source freshness, not new evidence framework mechanics.
records.title: MVP 0.1.5 Evidence Freshness and Confidence Rules

records.rationale: The original MVP 0.1 spec describes an earlier scope; the implemented system has moved through later account, commercial, KB, and UI milestones.
records.recommended_action: Keep for audit traceability; rely on current registry and maturity audits for execution priority.
records.title: GW2Radar MVP 0.1 Codex Development Spec

records.rationale: Compatibility hardening is covered through official contract, permission, safety, batching, and queue tests; live network behavior remains intentionally outside default tests.
records.recommended_action: Add optional live smoke documentation only after local contract stability remains clean.
records.title: MVP 0.2.0 Official API Compatibility Hardening

records.rationale: Paid report engine, entitlement, productized artifacts, and mock payment contracts exist; real payment integration remains explicitly out of MVP scope.
records.recommended_action: Keep mock payment and entitlement integration; defer real provider work until explicitly requested.
records.title: MVP 0.3.0 Paid Report Engine

records.rationale: Guild/static readiness includes team, consent, role coverage, privacy-safe member summary, and report coverage; broader SaaS collaboration is out of MVP scope.
records.recommended_action: Preserve privacy-safe team modeling and avoid expanding into full collaboration or subscription administration.
records.title: MVP 0.3.5 Guild / Static Readiness Console
